lessons.title: What is Lua?
lessons.content:
Lua is a lightweight programming language used in games like Roblox.

Programs run top to bottom. The simplest function is print().

lessons.title: Your First Code
lessons.content:
Code runs line by line. print() shows output.
Everything inside quotes is text.

lessons.title: Comments
lessons.content:
Comments are ignored by Lua.
Use -- for single-line comments.
lessons.challenge_description: Add a comment and print Learning Lua

lessons.title: Variables Explained
lessons.content:
Variables store values.
We use local to create them.
Example: local name = 'John'
lessons.challenge_description: Create a variable called language with value Lua and print it.

lessons.title: Numbers & Math
lessons.content:
Lua supports + - * / %
Math works like normal arithmetic.

lessons.title: String Basics
lessons.content:
Strings are text inside quotes.
You can combine them using ..

lessons.title: If Statements
lessons.content: If statements let your program make decisions.
lessons.code_examples:
local age = 18
if age >= 18 then
 print('Adult')
end
lessons.challenge_description: If score is 50 or more, print Pass

lessons.title: Else Statements
lessons.content: Else runs when the if condition is false.
lessons.code_examples: if 5 > 10 then print('yes') else print('no') end
lessons.challenge_description: If health is 0 print Dead, else Alive

lessons.title: Comparison Operators
lessons.challenge_description: Check if level equals 10 and print Max Level

lessons.title: While Loops
lessons.content: While loops repeat while a condition is true.
lessons.code_examples:
local i = 1
while i <= 3 do
 print(i)
 i = i + 1
end
lessons.challenge_description: Print 1 to 3 using a while loop

lessons.title: Functions Basics
lessons.challenge_description: Create a function that prints Hello Lua

lessons.title: Function Parameters
lessons.challenge_description: Create a function that multiplies two numbers and prints result

lessons.title: Tables (Arrays)
lessons.challenge_description: Print the second item in the table

lessons.title: Tables (Key-Value)
lessons.challenge_description: Create a table with name = Lua and print it

lessons.title: Intro to Game Scripting
lessons.content:
Lua is used in Roblox to control game behavior.
Scripts can control objects, players, and events.

daily_templates.title: FizzBuzz
daily_templates.description: Print 'FizzBuzz' - a classic programming challenge. For this simplified version, just print the word FizzBuzz.

daily_templates.title: String Builder
daily_templates.description: Concatenate 'Lua' and 'You' with a space and print 'Lua You'.

daily_templates.title: Power Play
daily_templates.description: Calculate and print 2 to the power of 10 (1024).

daily_templates.title: Type Check
daily_templates.description: Print the word 'string' (the type of text values in Lua).
daily_templates.starter_code: -- What type is a text value?

daily_templates.title: Lua Version
daily_templates.description: Print '5.4' - the latest major Lua version.
